subcodes.first_line: The world is illumined by the lights of the Manifestation of the Ancient King, the shrill voice of the Most Exalted Pen is raised, and the divine Lote-Tree yieldeth its delicate fruit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم بانوار ظهور مالک قدم منور و صریر قلم اعلی مرتفع و سدره منتهی جنیه لطیفه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
